parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Request Order Change

actor Buyer
actor Grower
actor Manager
control System
database db

Buyer -> System : Make **Order Change Request**
System -> db : Insert **Order\nChange Request**
System -> Manager : Email **Order\nChange Request**

alt Confirmation process
    Manager -> Buyer : Confirm details of **Order\nChange Request** over email
    Manager -> Grower : Confirm details of **Order\nChange Request** over email
else All agreed?
    Manager -> System : Edit **Order**
    System -> db : Update **Order**
    System -> db : Update **Order\nChange Request**
    System -> Grower : Email details **Order Change**
    System -> Buyer : Email details **Order Change**
else Not agreed to?
    note right of System
        Nothing to do here unless we add a
        **Change Request** editing function
    end note
end

legend right
1. //Email// could also mean text message,
phone call or face to face
endlegend

@enduml
```
